common.couldNotSave: Could not save. Please try again.

onboarding.buddyMiloSample: Hi! I'm Milo. Let's learn together.
onboarding.buddyLunaSample: Hello! I'm Luna. Shall we begin?
onboarding.buddyBothDesc: We'll take turns through your activities.
onboarding.ageHint: This helps us choose the right reading level and pace.
onboarding.ageYoungerDesc: Bigger buttons, captions on, slower narration.
onboarding.ageOlderDesc: Compact layout, richer text, normal narration.
onboarding.nicknameHint: Pick a fun animal name. You can change it later.
onboarding.micBody: We'll ask permission to use your microphone when we get to speaking practice. Your voice never leaves your device.

activities.listenAndTapAria: Listen and tap the matching picture
activities.singAlongNotReady: Song is on the way — sing it your way for now.
activities.singAlongSongOnTheWay: Song manifest is on the way.

garden.title: Word Garden
garden.growingPlaceholder: Play a lesson to plant your first word.

streak.newPlantAriaWithFreezes: New plant ready to grow, {count} {count, plural, one {freeze} other {freezes}} available
streak.ariaWithStreakAndFreezes: {count}-day streak, longest {longest}, {freezes} {freezes, plural, one {freeze} other {freezes}} available
streak.plantMissedYou: Your plant missed you. Let's grow together.

settings.title: Settings
settings.muteAllDesc: Silence everything for a quiet moment.
settings.focusModeDesc: Quiets music and extra sounds. Voice prompts stay on.
settings.captionsDesc: Show the words on screen while voice plays.
settings.autoplaySongsDesc: Start the next song without a tap.
settings.enableMicDesc: Used only for speaking practice. Your voice stays on this device.
settings.offlineEngineDesc: Extra-private speech check on Chrome. One-time 30 MB download.
settings.engineStatusOfflineFallback: Engine: Offline not yet available — using Web Speech for now
settings.micPrivacyNote: We use your device's built-in speech recognition (Web Speech). Your voice never leaves your device. Want extra privacy on Chrome? Enable the offline engine — a one-time 30 MB download.
settings.easierFontDesc: Switches to Lexend, a font many learners find easier to read.
settings.highContrastDesc: Stronger colour difference for text and buttons.
settings.micPrimerBody: When you reach speaking practice, your browser will ask permission to use the microphone. Your voice is checked on this device and never sent anywhere.

mic.enginePlaceholder: Offline engine isn't bundled in this build yet. Online engine is being used.
mic.engineError: Couldn't load the offline engine. Online engine will be used.

parent.title: Parent Dashboard
parent.weeklyChartAria: Daily minutes for the past 7 days
parent.streakNeverPunitive: Streaks cannot be lost punitively. Missed days are forgiven with a freeze, and a new plant starts whenever your child is ready.
parent.noLessonsYet: Start a lesson together to see your child's progress here.
parent.navDeleteDesc: Schedule a wipe with a 7-day grace.
parent.openBeforeToCancel: Open Parent Dashboard before then to cancel.
parent.settingsMicEnableDesc: Used only for speaking practice. The mic indicator is always visible while live.
parent.settingsMicReminder: Reminder: the mic indicator stays visible the entire time the microphone is live. Your child can tap it to stop at any moment.
parent.settingsEngineBrowserDesc: Fast, no download. Quality varies by browser.
parent.settingsEngineUnavailable: Offline engine unavailable. Using browser speech instead.
parent.settingsLimitNote: When the limit is reached, your child sees "Great job today! Let's come back tomorrow." No countdowns, no nagging.
parent.settingsContentDesc: Theme and topic filters are coming in a future update. Today the content set is curated to age band and our editorial guardrails.
parent.settingsNotifDesc: Off by default. Uses your browser's notification permission only; nothing is sent from a server.
parent.strictnessDesc: Strict makes the speech check tighter; Easy makes it gentler. Activities always pass after 3 tries so your child keeps moving forward.
parent.strictnessEasyDesc: Gentlest scoring. Best for new speakers.
parent.strictnessNormalDesc: Balanced. The default for most kids.
parent.strictnessStrictDesc: Tighter scoring. Best for confident speakers.
parent.exportBody: Your data is yours. This download includes every lesson, word, speaking attempt, and setting on this device, packaged as a single JSON file you can keep, share, or archive.
parent.exportLocalOnly: The file lives on this device only. Nothing is uploaded.
parent.exportSuccess: Download started. Your data is yours.
parent.deleteBody: This removes everything stored for your learner on this device: lessons, words, settings, and history. You can restore for 7 days.
parent.deleteFinal: After 7 days the data is permanently removed and cannot be recovered.
parent.deleteScheduledBody: Your data will be deleted on {date}. Until then you can return here to cancel.
parent.deleteUnderstand: I understand this will remove everything. I have 7 days to cancel before it is permanent.
parent.deleteUnderstandAria: I understand this will delete all data
parent.deleteAnnounceCouldNotSchedule: Could not schedule. Please try again.
parent.deleteAnnounceCancelled: Deletion cancelled. Your data is safe.
parent.deleteAnnounceCouldNotCancel: Could not cancel. Please try again.
parent.deleteGateDescription: One more check before we schedule the deletion.
parent.childPronDesc: Scores are shown to parents only. Your child sees encouragement bands instead.
parent.childGateDescription: Solve this to save the change.
parent.accountIntro: Connect an email to back up your child's progress and sync across devices. We use a two-step confirmation — required by COPPA — so the upgrade takes at least 24 hours to complete. Your child's data stays on this device until you finish step 3, then we send one final email to verify the address.
parent.accountFirstConfirm: Check your inbox for a confirmation link, then paste the token below.
parent.accountWaitBody: First confirmation received. Please come back in 24 hours to finish.
parent.accountWaitAvailable: You can complete the upgrade after {date}.
parent.accountAwaitingBody: We've sent a final confirmation to {email}. Click the link in that email to finish linking your account. Cloud sync will activate once verification completes.
parent.accountErrorBody: We couldn't send the final verification email{detail}. Your consent is recorded but the account isn't fully linked yet — please retry.
parent.accountDoneBody: Upgrade complete. Cloud sync is now active for this device.

gate.title: Grown-ups only
gate.descriptionOpenDashboard: Solve this to open the parent dashboard.

privacy.translationPending: This privacy policy is currently available in English only. A reviewed Turkish translation is coming.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.kidSummary: English4Kids never sends your voice over the internet. Your nickname stays on your device. Your grown-up can see what you learned, but no one else.

banner.translationPending: This privacy policy is currently available in English only. A reviewed Turkish translation is coming.

install.title: Want to keep playing offline?
install.body: Add English4Kids to your home screen so Milo can come along even when the Wi-Fi takes a nap.
